query:
SELECT id, title, status, totalScenes, completedScenes, updatedAt, createdAt
FROM musicVideoJobs
WHERE status IN ('assembling', 'rendering')
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
SELECT id, title, status, totalScenes, completedScenes, updatedAt, createdAt
FROM musicVideoJobs
WHERE status IN ('assembling', 'rendering')
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
